title: Anxious for Nothing
author: Max Lucado
subline: Casting every care on the one who cares for you.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A vertical column of WORRY words falling upward like balloons that won't lift off. The bottom-most is being LET GO of — its string cut, the only red detail. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1100)" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">
    <!-- Worries as text 'balloons' floating up, tied to the ground by a long string -->
    <g font-size="34" font-weight="300" fill="#cccccc" letter-spacing="0.04em">
      <text x="0" y="-380">WORRY</text>
      <text x="0" y="-300" opacity="0.7">FEAR</text>
      <text x="0" y="-220" opacity="0.55">STRESS</text>
      <text x="0" y="-140" opacity="0.4">DOUBT</text>
      <text x="0" y="-60" opacity="0.25">REGRET</text>
    </g>
    <!-- A vertical string holding them all -->
    <line x1="0" y1="-380" x2="0" y2="20" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="3 4"/>
    <!-- THE RED SNIP: scissors cutting the string at the bottom -->
    <g transform="translate(0 40)">
      <line x1="-30" y1="-10" x2="30" y2="-10" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="3"/>
      <!-- Mini scissors glyph -->
      <g transform="translate(40 0)" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="2" fill="none">
        <circle cx="-6" cy="-8" r="5"/>
        <circle cx="-6" cy="8" r="5"/>
        <line x1="-1" y1="-6" x2="16" y2="-2"/>
        <line x1="-1" y1="6" x2="16" y2="2"/>
      </g>
    </g>
    <!-- A small open hand below receiving the falling worries -->
    <g transform="translate(0 160)" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1" fill="none">
      <path d="M -50 0 Q -50 -10 -40 -10 L -40 -30 M -20 -10 L -20 -40 M 0 -10 L 0 -42 M 20 -10 L 20 -40 M 40 -10 L 40 -30 M 50 0 Q 50 20 0 24 Q -50 20 -50 0 Z"/>
    </g>
    <!-- The RECEIVED hand labeled 'GRACE' -->
    <text x="0" y="220" text-anchor="middle" font-size="20" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em">GRACE</text>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: A column of worry-words (WORRY, FEAR, STRESS, DOUBT, REGRET) tied by a string — a balloon bouquet that won't lift off. The string is being snipped by red scissors; below, an open hand waits. The red cut is the book's action: let go. 320px italic title centered.
